field.name: ma_vt
field.check: ma_vt <> '' and ma_vt not in (select ma_vt from dmvt)

field.name: dvt
field.check: dvt not in (select dvt from dmdvt)

field.name: tk_thue_mt
field.check: tk_thue_mt <> '' and tk_thue_mt not in (select tk from dmtk where loai_tk = 1)

processing.text: declare @duplicate nvarchar(512), @message nvarchar(4000), @q nvarchar(4000), @field varchar(32), @r int select @duplicate = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Thông tin trường Loại, Mã vật tư, Đơn vị tính và Ngày hiệu lực từ đã có trong thông tin chi tiết, không thể lưu được.' else N'The grid consists at leat 2 rows with the same Type, Item Code, UOM and Effective Date from, cannot save.'end if @@admin = 0 and @type = '1' begin if @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.FastBusiness$System$GetAuthorize(@@admin, @@userID, 'TaxableSubjectDeclaration', 'Edit') = 0 select @type = '0' end -- Update update @@table set dvt = case when a.dvt <> '' then a.dvt else b.dvt end from @@table a left join dmvt b on a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt if @type = '0' delete @@table from @@table a join dmkbtmt b on a.loai = b.loai and a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt and a.ngay_hl = b.ngay_hl -- Checking &Checking; select @field = 'dvt', @r = min(stt) from @@table a left join vdmvtqddvt b on a.dvt = b.dvt and (a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt or b.ma_vt = '*') left join dmvt c on a.ma_vt = c.ma_vt and a.dvt = c.dvt where b.dvt is null and c.dvt is null&Error; select a.* into #k from @@table a join dmkbtmt b on a.loai = b.loai and a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt and a.ngay_hl = b.ngay_hl delete @@table from @@table a join #k b on a.loai = b.loai and a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt and a.ngay_hl = b.ngay_hl -- Insert &Inserting; -- Update if @type = '1' begin &Updating; end
